prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Vineyard Lies Beneath Us
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Divorce Gothic
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: A town never forgets. It just redecorates.
Omen: a lake bell ringing without wind
Relationship dynamic: suspiciously healthy handyman friendship
Props: scarf with impossible timing, snow globe, casserole dish

Cast:
- Cole Sutton | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=magazine editor | threat_aura=0.21 | space=annex room described as seasonal materials | secrets=once left town without explaining why; buried one traumatic detail under work for years
- Cole Winterson | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=sommelier with unusual patience | threat_aura=0.65 | space=marina tackle room described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=rehearsed his alibi before anyone asked
- Cole Dane | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=real estate agent | threat_aura=0.32 | space=church basement described as retreat supplies | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for

- Jenna Sutton | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=substitute teacher | threat_aura=0.3 | space=storage unit described as old family things | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts; accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Tess Dane | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Gavin Dane | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Cole Winterson is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Cole Sutton says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Blackthorn Lake.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Cole?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Tess. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Cole. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The scarf with impossible timing is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Sienna."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
